== 0 {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"{}%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tunchangedAttributes := 0\n\tunchangedBlocks := 0\n\n\tmaximumAttributeKeyLen := 0\n\tvar attributeKeys {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01AjnNnXtFe5tbey7Nyq5mQf","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Good! Now I understand the structure. The `Diff` struct has:\n- `Renderer DiffRenderer` - can be nil\n- `Action plans.Action` - the action (Create, Update, Delete, NoOp, etc.)\n- `Replace bool` - whether it forces replacement\n\nThe `unknownRenderer` has a `before computed.Diff` field. The issue is that when rendering a non-Create action, it calls `renderer.before.RenderHuman()`, but if `renderer.before.Renderer` is nil, this will panic.\n\nLet me look at the exact error path:\n\n```go\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n```\n\nAt line 41, if `renderer.before.Renderer` is nil, `renderer.before.RenderHuman()` will call `diff.Renderer.RenderHuman()` which is nil, causing a panic.\n\nThe fix is to check if `renderer.before.Renderer` is nil. If it is, we should treat it like a Create action (just return \"(known after apply)\").\n\nNow let me look at the block.go issue. Lines 161, 173, 182:\n\n```go\nif renderer.blocks.UnknownBlocks[key] {\n    renderBlock(computed.NewDiff(Unknown(computed.Diff{}), plans.Create, false), \"\", opts)\n\n\n}\n```\n\nThis should instead pass the actual `diff.Action` instead of hardcoded `plans.Create`. true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ conn_info = { # forces replacement\n          ~ password = (sensitive value)\n            # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n        }\n        id        = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_moved(t *testing.T) {\n\tprevRunAddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\":  ~ foo = [\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        \"beta\",\n      + \"gamma\",\n        \"delta\",\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n    ]`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"multiple outputs changed, one sensitive\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"a\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(1),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(2),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"b\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"hunter2\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"correct-horse-battery-staple\"),\n\t\t\t\t\ttrue,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"c\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(false),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(true),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ a = 1 -> 2\n  ~ b = (sensitive value)\n  ~ c = false -> true`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tchanges := changes\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tOutputChanges: outputs,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\toutput := renderHumanDiffOutputs(renderer, diffs.outputs)\n\t\t\tif output != tc.output {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected diff.\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\n\", output, tc.output)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and updated\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"boop\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  # (moved from test_instance.previous)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ bar = \"baz\" -> \"boop\"\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"moved without changes\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\t\tDeposedKey:  tc.DeposedKey,\n\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  + foo = \"bar\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"removed output\":  ~ a = 1 -> 2\n  ~ b = (sensitive value)\n  ~ c = false -> true`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tchanges := bool) *plans.OutputChangeSrc {\n\taddr := addrs.AbsOutputValue{\n\t\tOutputValue: addrs.OutputValue{Name: name},\n\t}\n\n\tchange := &plans.OutputChange{\n\t\tAddr: addr, Change: plans.Change{\n\t\t\tBefore: before,\n\t\t\tAfter:  after,\n\t\t},\n\t\tSensitive: sensitive,\n\t}\n\n\tchangeSrc, err := change.Encode()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to encode change for %s: %s\", addr, err))\n\t}\n\n\treturn changeSrc\n}\n\n// A basic test schema using a configurable NestingMode for one (NestedType) attribute and one block\nfunc testSchema(nesting addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and updated\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  # (moved from test_instance.previous)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ bar = \"baz\" -> \"boop\"\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"moved without changes\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  + foo = \"bar\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"removed output\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  - foo = \"bar\" -> null`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"single string change\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = \"bar\" -> \"baz\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"element added to list\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"gamma\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = [\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        \"beta\",\n      + \"gamma\",\n        \"delta\",\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n    ]`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"multiple outputs changed, one sensitive\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"a\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(1),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(2),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"b\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"hunter2\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"correct-horse-battery-staple\"),\n\t\t\t\t\ttrue,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"c\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(false),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(true),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ a = 1 -> 2\n  ~ b = (sensitive value)\n  ~ c = false -> true`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tchanges := &plans.ChangesSrc{\n\t\t\t\tOutputs: tc.changes,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\toutputs, err := jsonplan.MarshalOutputChanges(changes)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal output changes\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tOutputChanges: outputs,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\toutput := renderHumanDiffOutputs(renderer, diffs.outputs)\n\t\t\tif output != tc.output {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected diff.\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\n\", output, tc.output)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_deferredActions(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tproviderAddr := addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\tProvider: string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"deferred create action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonAbsentPrereq,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange:
